_comment: DUMMY DATA — Sample Wazuh alert for rule 117004 (lateral movement flow)

rule.description: NetFlow: Possible lateral movement — 192.168.56.10 → 192.168.56.40:445 [SMB] on internal network

analyst_notes: Internal SMB connection. Correlate with Windows Security Event 4624/4625 on destination host. Was there an auth attempt? Check 192.168.56.10 endpoint for process tree around this time.
